name: io.github.sheldonzhuang/stock-sentinel
description: US stock attack/defense macro signal system: 4-dimension framework (AI supply chain / monetary / fiscal / administrative), 4-tier output, 26-year backtested, daily AI briefs. For research reference only, not investment advice.

environment_variables.name: STOCKSENTINEL_API_KEY
environment_variables.description: Optional API key for higher daily limits (default trial: 25 req/day)
